meta.def: T1 = T1_hat * sqrt(m*h^3/(E*Ic)); m [tonf*s2/m] por piso, h [m], E [tonf/m2], Ic [m4] de UNA columna (portico de 2)

formula.def: T1_hat = T_shear(n)*exp(u*(p0+p1*ln n+p2*ln^2 n)+u^2*(p3+p4*ln n+p5*ln^2 n)); u=1/(1+rho); T_shear = 2*pi/(2*sin(pi/(2*(2n+1)))*sqrt(24)); formula de bolsillo (max ~8.5%), la tabla es la fuente
